headline: How The Nordson (NDSN) Narrative Is Shifting As Targets Rise Above Updated Fair Value
summary: Nordson’s refreshed analyst narrative comes with a slight adjustment to fair value, moving from US$313.40 to US$307.38. While some firms are now publishing higher price targets in the US$325 to US$335 range, that gap to the revised fair value reflects differing views on how much recent execution and end market stabilization should influence valuation. As you read on, you will see what is driving these opinions and how to track the story as it continues to evolve. Analyst Price Targets don't...
